response.original_title: The Best of Aliens Uncovered: Part 2
response.overview: Explore the most fascinating and compelling UFO sightings featured in the second half of the Aliens Uncovered series. From the hotspot of the Sacred Black Mountains where ancient indigenous peoples congregated to stargaze, and even the Vatican has built an observation telescope, we must question: are we really alone in the universe?
response.tagline: Explore the top 10 UFO sightings from the second half of Aliens Uncovered series.
response.title: The Best of Aliens Uncovered: Part 2
